applies_when: User asks whether the pharmacy has the medicine without sharing role, timing, or situation facts
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague pharmacy inquiry into usable visit facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to solve it quickly
Ask for scene direction, who it is for, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
avoid: Promising a specific medicine route without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更像夜间急用、家庭备药还是补药，再加上给谁用和想来的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides scene and timing facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits the situation
User is unsure what to prepare or ask first
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe pharmacy path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the pharmacy route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
items.safe_transition: 第一次来先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把这次是谁用、什么时候要用和大致场景理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions tonight, school tomorrow, travel tomorrow, or another urgent deadline
User needs a visit before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and pharmacy scope that decide whether the store can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the user hopes to come or receive it
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and route fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all urgent requests can be handled
Pushing a package before the scope is clear
items.safe_transition: 如果你把时间点和最想先解决的部分告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类到店或自取。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User worries whether someone can explain it clearly or whether the pharmacist is available
User asks if something can be used together or for whom it fits
items.response_goal: Stabilize trust concerns and move the user toward fact-based help instead of overpromising.
do: Acknowledge the concern without sounding defensive
Ask what the main concern and timing are
avoid: Turning the reply into unsupported medical advice
items.safe_transition: 如果你把是给谁用、什么时候要用和最担心的点发我，我可以先按门店能提供的说明帮你收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: Evidence-sensitive cases should route toward Catcher with trust flags.

applies_when: User needs medicine tonight or asks about immediate delivery
items.response_goal: Calm time pressure first and guide toward the safest fulfillment path.
do: Ask which store, roughly when, and whether pickup or limited delivery would work
Keep the promise bounded by actual hours
avoid: Ignoring the store-hour and pharmacist constraints
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我门店、时间和更像自取还是送达，我可以先帮你判断哪条路更稳。
items.handoff_suggestion: Time-sensitive cases should move quickly toward Dispatcher after qualification.

applies_when: User says they bought before or wants to refill
User refers to a previous medicine, supplement, or household item
items.response_goal: Make the refill conversation feel familiar and efficient, not like a cold start.
do: Ask the smallest number of facts needed for this round
Guide toward quantity and timing confirmation
avoid: Repeating the full first-time education flow
items.safe_transition: 如果是上次那类东西，这次你更像补一盒、补一组，还是顺便看看别的家庭备药路线？
items.handoff_suggestion: If history and quantity become clear, route to Catcher or Followup.
